class TinyURL:
    def __init__(self):
        # long_to_short maps original long URLs to their generated short URLs
        self.long_to_short = {}
        # short_to_long maps generated short URLs back to their original long URLs
        self.short_to_long = {}
        # Counter to generate unique IDs for short URLs
        self.counter = 0
        # Base URL for the tinyurl service
        self.base_url = "http://tinyurl.com/"
        # Character set for base62 encoding (0-9, a-z, A-Z)
        self.charset = "0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ"
        # Base for encoding (length of the charset)
        self.base = len(self.charset)

    def _id_to_base62(self, num: int) -> str:
        """Converts an integer ID to a base62 string."""
        if num == 0:
            return self.charset[0]
        
        res = []
        while num > 0:
            res.append(self.charset[num % self.base])
            num //= self.base
        # The result is built in reverse, so reverse it back
        return "".join(res[::-1])

    def encode(self, longUrl: str) -> str:
        """
        Encodes a long URL to a short URL.
        If the long URL has already been encoded, it returns the existing short URL.
        Otherwise, it generates a new unique short URL.
        """
        if longUrl in self.long_to_short:
            return self.long_to_short[longUrl]

        # Generate a unique short code using the counter and base62 conversion
        short_code = self._id_to_base62(self.counter)
        self.counter += 1

        # Construct the full short URL
        shortUrl = self.base_url + short_code

        # Store the mappings in both hash maps
        self.long_to_short[longUrl] = shortUrl
        self.short_to_long[shortUrl] = longUrl
        
        return shortUrl

    def decode(self, shortUrl: str) -> str:
        """
        Decodes a short URL back to its original long URL.
        Returns the original long URL if found, otherwise None.
        """
        return self.short_to_long.get(shortUrl, None)
